cases.prompt: Set up SEO for my Laravel app with sitemap and meta tags.
cases.expect: Skill installs spatie/laravel-sitemap and artesaos/seotools, publishes config, and creates sitemap command.

cases.prompt: Configure sitemaps and structured data for my models.
cases.expect: Skill enables model-based SEO via ralphjsmit/laravel-seo and provides Filament integration for SEO data.
